description: Pagination information for navigating result sets

next.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results

after.description: Cursor token for the next page

link.description: API link to the next page of results

prev.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving the previous page of results

before.description: Cursor token for the previous page

link.description: API link to the previous page of results

title: Paging
